page_title: Authority to Release Personal Information to a Designated Individual (IMM 5475) - Canada.ca
h1: Authority to Release Personal Information to a Designated Individual (IMM 5475)

h3: How to download, save and open this form

sections.heading: How to download, save and open this form
When to use this form
items: Use this form if you want to allow us to give your personal information, such as the status of your application, to someone who will not act as your representative .

sections.heading: Paper applications
bullets: If you haven’t submitted your application: include the form in your application package and send it to the address listed in your instruction guide.
If you have already submitted your application: send us the form electronically through this Web form

sections.heading: Online applications
bullets: If you haven’t submitted your application: upload this form along with your online application.
If you have already submitted your application: send us the form electronically through this Web form
